headline: Carnival Faces Oil Shock And Onboard Crackdown Testing Margins And Brand
summary: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL) is facing renewed earnings and operational risks as crude oil prices climb sharply on rising Middle East tensions. The company does not hedge its fuel needs, leaving results more directly exposed to swings in energy markets. Carnival has also issued a high profile warning to passengers, outlining strict onboard behavioral rules and the potential for fines and disembarkation for disruptive conduct. Carnival Corporation runs large scale cruise operations, where...
